channel.title: Conference Registration :: IEEE International Conference
channel.description: Registration Link to be announced Registration Fees * Types Early bird (before July 28, 2024) (Eur) Regular Fee (Eur) Max papers Regular (IEEE Member)2 630 730 2 Regular (IEEE IES Member)2 600 700 2 Regular (IEEE Life Member)2 780 € 880 € 2 Regular (IEEE Non-Member) 780 € 880 € 2 Student (IEEE Member, non-author)2,3 780 € 880 € 2 Student (Non IEEE Member, non-author)3 780 € 880 € 2 One day / workshops (Author, IEEE IES Member)2,4 780 € 880 € 2 One day / workshops (author, IEEE Non-Member)4 780 € 880 € 2 One day / workshops (non-author, IEEE Member)2,3 780 € 880 € 2 One day / workshops (non-author, IEEE Non-Member)3 780 € 880 € 2 2 IEEE member id is required. 3 Paper Publication not included, full registration is needed for the paper to be included in ETFA proceedings and IEEE Xplore® DigitalLibrary. 4 Paper Publication is included only for workshop papers, not for regular and work-in-progress papers of the main conference, which requires a full registration.
